chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 894 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 11.01.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents No.3 & 4. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner has confirmed that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, and he does not press the petition, which is, in above terms, is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
